ddls:
CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the municipality belongs to */,
  "distance_from_center" REAL /* Distance in kilometers from a central point */,
  "inhabitants" INTEGER /* Number of inhabitants in the municipality */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the municipality in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the municipality in meters */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (inhabitants per square kilometer) */,
  "last_census_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last census */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the municipality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_municipalities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the region */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cumulative_inhabitants" (
  "cumulative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cumulative record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality */,
  "cumulative_inhabitants" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of inhabitants up to this municipality from the central point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the cumulative inhabitants data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cumulative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cumulative_inhabitants_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure project */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality where the project is located */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the infrastructure project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Planned, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "completion_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the project completed */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the project data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_projects_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_planning" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban planning initiative */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality where the initiative is taking place */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the urban planning initiative */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the initiative */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the initiative started */,
  "estimated_completion" INTEGER /* Estimated year of completion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the initiative (e.g., Planned, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the initiative */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the initiative data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_planning_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency service */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality where the service is provided */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of emergency service (e.g., Fire, Medical) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the emergency service */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time in minutes */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the service (e.g., 24/7, Daytime) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the service data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_services_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population trend record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population for the year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the population */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the population data (e.g., Census, Estimate) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the trend data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education facility */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality where the facility is located */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the education facility */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., School, University) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., Primary, Secondary, Tertiary) */,
  "funding" REAL /* Annual funding for the facility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the facility data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_facilities_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality where the facility is located */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., Hospital, Clinic) */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the facility */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations offered by the facility (e.g., Cardiology, Pediatrics) */,
  "funding" REAL /* Annual funding for the facility */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the facility data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_facilities_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic activity */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality where the activity takes place */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic activity */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the activity belongs to */,
  "employment" INTEGER /* Number of people employed in the activity */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue generated by the activity */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the activity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the activity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_activities_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_network" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation network record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality where the network is present */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., Road, Rail) */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the transportation network */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of transportation services */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator of the transportation network */,
  "funding" REAL /* Annual funding for the network */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the network data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_network_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)
